memoryArtifacts.headline: Jean Pierre Bondurant family group sheet with life sketch and sources
memoryArtifacts.description:
The notes in this record (p. 3) quote a book by Herbert Bondurant which states the parents of Jean Pierre Bondurant were Dr. Joseph and Elizabeth Ann Chastain.  In Family Search another set of parents are listed for him, with some documentation. More research is needed to see what primary source documentation gives the strongest evidence for a particular set of parents.

This family group record was created by Jeanene Watkins Scott.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Multon於大約1304年出生在英國波藍德艾格雷蒙特時，她的父親Sir Thomas III de Multon of Egremont29歲，母親Eleanor de Burgh23歲。她於大約1320年與Sir Robert FitzWalter在英國波藍德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1363年6月16日在英國諾福爾可普納爾享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可蕾托 登莫福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Multon于大约1304年出生在英国波藍德艾格雷蒙特时，她的父亲Sir Thomas III de Multon of Egremont29岁，母亲Eleanor de Burgh23岁。她于大约1320年与Sir Robert FitzWalter在英国波藍德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1363年6月16日在英国諾福爾可普納爾享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可蕾托 登莫福。

nameMeanings.name: Multon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Moulton
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Multon was born about 1304, in Egremont, Cumberland, England, her father, Sir Thomas III de Multon of Egremont, was 29 and her mother, Eleanor de Burgh, was 23. She married Sir Robert FitzWalter about 1320, in Cumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 16 June 1363, in Hempnall, Norfolk, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in Little Dunmow, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Multon est née environ 1304, à Egremont, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas III de Multon of Egremont, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Burgh, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert FitzWalter environ 1320, à Cumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 16 juin 1363, à Hempnall, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Little Dunmow, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Multon um 1304 in Egremont, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas III de Multon of Egremont 29 und ihre Mutter Eleanor de Burgh 23. Sie hat um 1320 in Cumberland, England Sir Robert FitzWalter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 16. Juni 1363 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Hempnall, Norfolk, England und wurde in Little Dunmow, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Multon è nata il circa 1304 nel Egremont, Cumberland, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas III de Multon of Egremont, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Eleanor de Burgh, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert FitzWalter circa 1320, nel Cumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 16 giugno 1363, nel Hempnall, Norfolk, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Little Dunmow, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Multonが約1304年にイギリスクウンバーランドエグレモントで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas III de Multon of Egremontは29歳，母Eleanor de Burghは23歳であった。約1320年にイギリスクウンバーランドでSir Robert FitzWalterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1363年6月16日にイギリスノーフォルクヘンプナルで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスリットル ダンモウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Multon(이)가 대략 1304년 영국 쿠벌랜드 그렘트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas III de Multon of Egremont(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor de Burgh(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1320년 영국 쿠벌랜드에서 Sir Robert FitzWalter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1363년 6월 16일 영국 노르폴크 헤p널에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 리틀 던모에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Multon nasceu aproximadamente 1304, em Egremont, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas III de Multon of Egremont, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Burgh, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert FitzWalter aproximadamente 1320, em Cumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 16 de junho de 1363, em Hempnall, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Little Dunmow, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Multon родилась около 1304 г. в местности эгремонт, кумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas III de Multon of Egremont было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Burgh, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert FitzWalter около 1320 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 16 июня 1363 г. в местности хемпналл, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности литл дунмоу, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Multon nació aproximadamente 1304, en Egremont, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas III de Multon of Egremont, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Eleanor de Burgh, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir Robert FitzWalter aproximadamente 1320, en Cumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 16 de junio de 1363, en Hempnall, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Little Dunmow, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
